summary: Field-level CRM patch pipeline for image intake: real updateContact write path, auto-mode upgrade, identity-doc-to-existing-client update, field-level diff preview, extraction always visible.
implementedFixAreas: updateContact write adapter + domain model registration
planContactUpdateFromImage emits updateContact instead of createInternalNote
identity doc + matching existing client → update instead of create
extraction visibility: never 'nothing read' when facts exist
diff-aware UI message in contact_update_from_image mode
caveats: Payment portal: preview-only (no real write endpoint), UI honestly reflects this
updateContact server action requires firstName + lastName; extraction must provide both
Multimodal extraction depends on feature flag enablement per tenant
CRM diff adds one DB query per contact_update_from_image flow
